# 2022-06-01

| Rule ID     | Description                                   | Previous Action    | New Action    | Notes                                                       |
| ----------- | --------------------------------------------- | ------------------ | ------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------- |
| ...d2f294d7 | HTTP requests trying to impersonate browsers. | managed\_challenge | ddos\_dynamic | Pick different actions depending on attack characteristics. |
